program.name: Tiny Leela browser engine dovetail research
program.objective: Build a tiny in-browser Leela-like chess engine with policy/WDL neural evaluation, PUCT search, ONNX Runtime Web deployment, and verified chess correctness.

L000.title: baseline trajectory
L000.hypothesis: Improve from the root baseline while scheduler spawns diverse lanes.

N0001.hypothesis: Create minimal TypeScript/Node test scaffold so engine infrastructure can be built and verified in future lanes.

decision.reason: Bootstrap score rose from 0 to 32 and checks pass. The scheduler is currently treating foundational infrastructure as normal ideas, which is useful for tracking but can feel over-fragmented before the engine skeleton exists.

N0002.hypothesis: Convert the over-fragmented pre-work into an explicit L000 foundation substrate and separate true research-lane ideas from shared engine infrastructure.

decision.reason: The setup now has a minimum shared engine substrate and the idea queue distinguishes blocking pre-work from differentiated lanes. Bootstrap score improved from 32 to 98 with checks passing.

R0001.hypothesis: Create minimal TypeScript/Node test scaffold so engine infrastructure can be built and verified in future lanes.
R0001.implementation: Added package.json, tsconfig.json, src/index.ts, tests/smoke.test.mjs, and made checks only run tsc when TypeScript is installed locally.
R0001.learned: Bootstrap score rose from 0 to 32 and checks pass. The scheduler is currently treating foundational infrastructure as normal ideas, which is useful for tracking but can feel over-fragmented before the engine skeleton exists.
R0001.next_action: Treat core infra as L000 foundation/backlog or a milestone checklist, then spawn separate lanes only after board/movegen/codec/search interfaces exist.

R0002.hypothesis: Convert the over-fragmented pre-work into an explicit L000 foundation substrate and separate true research-lane ideas from shared engine infrastructure.
R0002.implementation: Added board/FEN parsing, UCI/action move codec, pseudo-legal move generation and makeMove, feature encoder, evaluator interface, minimal search entry point, move encoding/browser docs, substrate tests, and reclassified loaded infra ideas as foundation_milestone while appending true research lanes.
R0002.learned: The setup now has a minimum shared engine substrate and the idea queue distinguishes blocking pre-work from differentiated lanes. Bootstrap score improved from 32 to 98 with checks passing.
R0002.next_action: Continue L000 only for hard correctness gaps such as full legal check/perft fixtures; otherwise schedule true lanes for search/runtime/model/training/evaluation comparisons.
